product_name: Hot Wheels Creative Maker Kitz - Custom Monster Trucks Kit - Town Hauler

bullets: GO BIG - This custom kit Monster Truck can take on the gnarliest terrain! Build the truck from the snap-fit parts, pull back and watch them fly over the stunt ramp provided! They can even do a wheelie!
CUSTOMISABLE - Decorate the Monster Truck to make it your own with the five Hot Wheels coloured marker pens included with this creative kit!

EASY TO BUILD - This custom kit is easy to build requiring no glue or scissors making it a safe and fun activity for children to do independently or with an adult. It is also recognised as having some STEM learning benefits!
ECO FRIENDLY - With the car body made entirely from recyclable material and the packaging doubling up as a stunt ramp that you can also decorate, this is a great eco friendly toy!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS TOY - Featuring one of the iconic Hot Wheels Monster Trucks, this kit allows children to build and decorate their vehicle as well as play when completed!
content.description: With the Custom Monster Truck Kit you're the designer! Assemble the snap-fit parts made from durable recyclable plastic, add power with the 4x4 pull-back motors, then use 5 x Hot Wheels pens included to create your unique custom design! Build, Race & Collect Hot Wheels™ Maker Kitz!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Monster Truck Body Panel Kit, 2 x Monster Wheels with Pull Back Motor, 5 x Coloured Pens, 1 x Cardboard Stunt Ramp, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
